calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Eric Shiu, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Salesforce.com, Inc.
Ronald Toney, Global Bad Debt Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Proctor Investment Managers LLC.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on January 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 29, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Salesforce.com, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Proctor Investment Managers LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,345.36.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,825.40.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $620.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,790.76.

Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
